message:
perf(time): use bitmap-guided iteration in timer wheel for sparse slot scanning

Replace linear iteration over all SLOTS_PER_LEVEL entries in
next_deadline() and promote_coalescing_window_entries() with
bitmap-word scanning using trailing_zeros(). Each iteration step
now processes a u64 bitmap word, finding set bits and clearing them
with word &= !(1u64 << bit_idx), skipping empty slots entirely.
This reduces O(SLOTS_PER_LEVEL) to O(occupied_slots) for both
operations, which is a significant speedup for sparse timer wheels
where most slots are empty.

Sleep: remove unnecessary mut on fallback_handles in reset/reset_after/
Drop paths. Fix fallback thread to drop the state lock before storing
the completed_for_thread flag, preventing unnecessary lock contention
during the thread's final cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
